SEARCH
Package com.monkey.mcbot.api.model

Class BotSpawnRequest

java.lang.Object
com.monkey.mcbot.api.model.BotSpawnRequest
public final class BotSpawnRequest extends Object
Immutable spawn request used by IBotManager.spawn(...).

The request includes mode, ownership, targets and settings. Validation is enforced in the builder BotSpawnRequest.Builder.build().
